visual_description: A low-angle, wide shot captures a city street scene under an overcast sky. The camera is positioned on the ground, looking up at the side of a modern building with large windows. To the right, an elevated highway or overpass dominates the upper right of the frame. The audio consists solely of a slow, melancholic instrumental piece. A gentle, somber melody, likely played by strings, creates a serious and contemplative atmosphere. The music is atmospheric and slightly mournful, evoking a sense of gravity and reflection, as if setting the stage for a significant or somber event. There is no dialogue or other sound effects present. As the camera slowly tilts down, more of the street comes into view. A group of police officers in uniform are gathered in the middle of the road, which is blocked off with blue and white police tape. Several police cars and a white ambulance are parked along the street. In the background, more of the urban environment is visible, including traffic lights and other city infrastructure. The Chinese characters "风行网" are visible in the upper left corner of the screen.
